news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新去中心化交易所交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked (TVL) rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_zh: Cardano 2026年Plutus V4升级路线图公布
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，提升智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG published Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enhancing smart contract expressiveness and lowering fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币提议引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for small transfers.
